title: Marketplace Manager - Sugar Cosmetics Digital Technologies - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Sugar Cosmetics Digital Technologies - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
Sugar Cosmetics Digital Technologies invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Marketplace Manager at our Madurai location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Sugar Cosmetics Digital Technologies:
Sugar Cosmetics Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sugar Cosmetics Digital Technologies!
